TEMPSALOXY-cod-volume  
Issue 4.0 – November 2025 
1) INTRODUCTION 
a) Product Name  
OMI_HEALTH_TEMPSALOXY_BALTIC_cod_volume. 
b) Indicator Evaluation Method 
The cod reproductive volume is computed from salinity, temperature and oxygen 
concentrations as described by Raudsepp et al. (2018) and as previously published in 
the literature by Plikshs et al (2015), for instance. The daily salinity and temperature data 
is extracted from the BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003_011 product and oxygen 
concentrations have been extracted from the BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_BGC_003_012 
products. The accuracy of the index is directly dependent on the accuracy of the Baltic 
reanalysis products (BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003_011 and 
BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_BGC_003_012) theref ore evaluation is based on the QUID 
documents of the products. 
c) Copernicus Marine products used as input for the computation

2) SCIENTIFIC VALIDATION  
a) Cod Reproductive Volume  
The cod reproductive volume index is calculated based on modelled salinity, 
temperature and oxygen data, hence the accuracy of the 
BALTIC_OMI_HEALTH_codt_volume depends on these input variables.  
In the CMEMS-BAL-QUID-003-011 the salinity of reanalysis product has been compared 
with all available measurements across the Baltic for period of 1993 until one year to 
present. As the data assimilation is employed the model results of reanalysis show only 
small biases (<0.2 g
